playbook.intent: Across two quarters, parallel to delivery work: pick one client-pain pattern, validate it as a productized SaaS, ship a paid v1 to 5-10 customers, and decide whether to scale, sunset, or fold into the freelance offer.
playbook.scope: Across two quarters, parallel to delivery work: pick one client-pain pattern, validate it as a productized SaaS, ship a paid v1 to 5-10 customers, and decide whether to scale, sunset, or fold into the freelance offer.

success-criteria.criterion: Pick the pain pattern stage complete: Idea brief
Side build stage complete: v1 deployed
Validate growth stage complete: Activation funnel doc
Decide: scale / sunset / fold stage complete: Decision doc

stage.name: Pick the pain pattern
stage.intent: From client work, isolate one repeating pain that could be a product.

tasks.task: Audit last 12 months of client requests for repeating asks
Validate with 5 prospect interviews (not current clients)

stage.decision-gate: Advance once ≥3 of 5 interviewees confirm pain is top-3 and recurring.

stage.name: Side build
stage.intent: Ship a paid v1 in fixed weekly time-box without harming client cadence.

tasks.task: Time-box product work to N hours/week
Ship a paid v1 to 5-10 design partners

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 5 paying customers + retention >2 months. Otherwise re-scope.

stage.name: Validate growth
stage.intent: Acquire + activate + retain enough users to test scalability.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when MoM growth ≥20% AND M2 retention ≥40%. Otherwise iterate.

stage.name: Decide: scale / sunset / fold
stage.intent: Written decision: scale, sunset, or fold into freelance offer.

tasks.task: Compile evidence: MRR, churn, founder energy

stage.decision-gate: Required artifact: written decision with explicit next steps. No 'maybe'.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-side-build --format md, agent: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-side-build --format context, json: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-side-build --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
